name: Copy.ai
data_egress_concerns: Sales email drafts containing customer names, deal sizes, and internal pricing
Marketing copy inputs that reveal product roadmaps or unreleased feature details
Internal workflow prompts that describe business processes or proprietary methodologies
Customer case study data pasted for content generation
training_use_default: Copy.ai states that Enterprise plan data is not used for model training. Free and lower-tier data handling should be reviewed in current terms. Confirm opt-out mechanisms for non-enterprise tiers.
